Container.Name: AutoCoder
Container.Overview:
AutoCoder is a long-running autonomous coding agent powered by the Claude Agent SDK. Build complete applications over multiple sessions with a React-based UI for monitoring progress in real-time.
Features: - Two-agent pattern (initializer + coding agent) - Real-time progress tracking with Kanban board - Automatic session continuation - Feature dependency management - Regression testing - Beautiful React UI with neobrutalism design
Requirements: - Anthropic API key from console.anthropic.com

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for accessing the web interface

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Stores Claude Code settings, credentials, and project registry database

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Your Anthropic API key from console.anthropic.com (Required). No 'claude login' needed!

Config.Name: Docker Mode
Config.Description: Enables external network access (should always be true)

Config.Name: Playwright Headless
Config.Description: Run browser automation in headless mode (true = invisible, false = visible browser window)

Config.Name: Custom API Base URL
Config.Description: Optional: Custom API endpoint for GLM mode or alternative providers

Config.Name: Custom Auth Token
Config.Description: Optional: Authentication token for custom API endpoint

Config.Name: N8N Webhook URL
Config.Description: Optional: N8N webhook URL for progress notifications

Config.Name: Sonnet Model Override
Config.Description: Optional: Custom model for Sonnet (e.g., glm-4.7 for GLM mode)

Config.Name: Opus Model Override
Config.Description: Optional: Custom model for Opus (e.g., glm-4.7 for GLM mode)

Config.Name: Haiku Model Override
Config.Description: Optional: Custom model for Haiku (e.g., glm-4.5-air for GLM mode)
